children.heading: .—Waiver of Intergovernmental Personnel Act Mobility Program Limits
children.label: a .—Waiver of Intergovernmental Personnel Act Mobility Program Limits
children.text: The Secretary may waive the limit on the period and number of assignments required under with respect to an individual who performs research for the Department under the mobility program under subchapter VI of chapter 33 of such title (commonly referred to as the “Intergovernmental Personnel Act Mobility Program”).section 3372(a) of title 5

children.heading: .—Outside Earned Income for Research for the Department
children.label: b .—Outside Earned Income for Research for the Department
A
children.text: the research has been approved in accordance with procedures prescribed by the Under Secretary for Health;

children.label: B
children.text: the employee conducts research under the supervision of personnel of the Department; and

children.label: C
children.text: the Secretary agreed to the terms of such compensation in writing.
An employee described in this subsection is an employee who has an appointment within the Department, whether with or without compensation, and without regard to the source of such compensation.
